signals.raw:
Fed Puts Rate Cuts on Pause Until Further Notice | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) kept the federal funds rate at 3.5%-3.75% on Wednesday, signaling no rush for reductions amid strong economic growth above the long-run trend, stabilizing employment, and elevated inflation[1]. North Korea's Kim Jong Un Pledges "Unconditional and Permanent" Support to Putin | NO | MED confidence**  
Kim sent a letter to Putin reaffirming deep strategic ties amid U.S.-Russia tensions over a seized Russian tanker (Bella One), reported January 9, 2026—not breaking news today—and unlikely to newly shift prediction markets on Russia-North Korea alliances.[1]

signals.headline: Russia Reveals Iran Has Activated a "Nuclear Weapon," Trump Faces Major Shock Ahead of Deadline | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia Reveals Iran Has Activated a "Nuclear Weapon," Trump Faces Major Shock Ahead of Deadline | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Dmitry Medvedev, Russian Deputy Chairman of the Security Council, compared the Strait of Hormuz to Iran's "nuclear weapon" amid escalating tensions, occurring today (April 11, 2026) as Trump's Iran deadline looms; this unverified claim could jolt markets on nuclear escalation
